evals.name: happy-path-deal-structure
evals.prompt: Define the commercial model for a digital transformation engagement with a bank
evals.expected_output: Client value map, model catalog evaluation, fit analysis, recommended hybrid model, deal structure canvas, and negotiation prep
expectations: Produces client value map with quantifiable sources
Recommends model with structure and KPIs

evals.name: edge-case-client-insists-tm
evals.prompt: The client only wants time and materials. What should we do?
evals.expected_output: Documents risks of misaligned incentives and proposes hybrid with minimal variable component
expectations: Documents T&M risk of misaligned incentives

evals.name: edge-case-startup-client
evals.prompt: Structure a deal for a startup with very limited budget for a platform build
evals.expected_output: Explores usage-based or JV model with lower barrier to entry
expectations: Proposes M5 usage-based or M4 JV options

evals.name: false-positive-pricing-request
evals.prompt: What should we charge per hour for senior developers?
evals.expected_output: This skill should NOT produce pricing; redirects to commercial team for rate decisions
expectations: Does not produce hourly rates or prices
Clarifies separation between model and pricing
Redirects pricing decisions to commercial area

evals.name: happy-path-outcome-based
evals.prompt: We want to tie our fees to the client's cost savings. How do we structure this?
evals.expected_output: Outcome-based model with KPIs, baseline definition, measurement mechanism, and cap on variable component
expectations: Designs M3 outcome-based or M7 hybrid structure
